summary: Solid test suite covering all core functionality with good unit test breadth and real workflow integration via act. Unit tests (test_bumper.py) comprehensively exercise parse_version, parse_commits, bump_version, update_version_file, generate_changelog, and CLI behavior. Integration tests (test_workflow_act.py) verify workflow structure, actionlint compliance, and exact output values from multiple test cases via Docker/act. Main gaps: (1) integration tests only verify VERIFY: output line but don't assert actual file state changes (CHANGELOG.md contents, package.json updates) after workflow runs; (2) limited edge case coverage (no tests for BREAKING CHANGE footer with no preceding commit, multiple consecutive footers, whitespace/unicode handling, empty descriptions, malformed JSON); (3) internal functions like _prepend_changelog not directly unit-tested, only indirectly via CLI; (4) no error scenario tests in integration tests. Would catch most regressions in core version bumping logic and workflow integration but misses subtle edge cases and doesn't fully validate workflow side effects.
